text:
at. 18 or21 when Jupiter transits Ketu and
contacts Saturn in Virgo. He will be
the head of the servers in the Institution, when Jupiter comes to Scorpio (a
friend's house) after meeting him in Libra. Thereafter, jupiter contacts Venus.
There is Mercury next to him who has exchanged places with Saturn in Virgo.
Therefore, the native will marry a woman (Venus) who had been in love with
some one else, and have come and begun working in the native's concern.
But, she will go away from him between 33 and 35 years. The native will
serve in a temporary establishment and make good money. He will live upto
69-70 years of age.
CHART 355
The native will be sober, will have only mediocre education and will
shine in trade.
Jupiter conjunct Mercury aspecting Saturn and the Moon in Virgo
enable the native to make money by trading in medical goods and by
travelling and visiting many places (Saturn conjunct the Moon). He will have
eight brothers and one sister.
